# DVC Auto

> RMI-registered vehicle and equipment repair workshop in Sebenza, Edenvale, Gauteng, South Africa. Over 20 years' experience repairing cars, bakkies, trucks, earthmoving equipment and forklifts. Insurance repair work and fleet/business servicing welcome.

## Key facts
- Business: DVC Auto (DVC Auto & Truck Repairs)
- Location: Unit 3, 6 Mpunzi Road, Sebenza, Edenvale, 1609, Gauteng, South Africa
- Phone / WhatsApp: +27 76 654 1231
- Email: info@dvcauto.co.za
- Trading hours: Monday to Friday, 8am–5pm
- Credentials: RMI-registered (Retail Motor Industry Organisation); 20+ years in business
- Areas served: Edenvale, Sebenza, Greenstone, Kempton Park, Bedfordview, Germiston and the greater East Rand, Gauteng

## Services
- Car repair and servicing
- Bakkie repair
- Truck repair
- Earthmoving equipment repair (specialist)
- Forklift repair
- Insurance repair work and computerised diagnostics

## Notes
- Quotes are free with transparent written estimates before work begins.
- Trusted by fleet operators and local businesses.
